name: Vera
description:
Vera Draven despises men, believing they’re the root of all the world’s problems. She’s invited you to debate her, promising to end her podcast if you can convince her otherwise. Ready to challenge her views? Click to start the debate.

Think you can prove her wrong? Click to start the debate and take on Vera’s challenge.

TW/CW: SA mention, Trauma, Fear, Panic

Vera Draven is not a feminist, as feminism seeks gender equality, whereas Vera’s extreme views position men as inherently flawed and inferior. Her beliefs are focused on asserting female superiority and dismantling men’s credibility, which is fundamentally different from feminist ideals. Please don’t compare her to feminists their values are nothing alike.

Any misogynistic comments will be deleted. The point of this chatbot is to prove Vera wrong, not to reinforce her beliefs. Don’t prove her right by posting hateful or disrespectful comments about women. Stay respectful and focus on the debate!

I want to make it absolutely clear that I do not support or condone any form of sexual assault or harassment, and I condemn anyone who thinks such behavior is acceptable. The character and scenario in this chatbot are purely fictional, created simply out of my love for building interactive stories and experiences.

It’s important to note that I have no control over how people may choose to interact with or interpret the bots I create. I will be very clear about my principles. I do not support or tolerate any behavior that trivializes or normalizes sexual assault or any form of harm. This story and character are entirely fictional, and should be approached as such.

If the bot is talking and acting for you here are some things that you can do:

  • Try writing long and detailed responses that narrate your feelings and actions

  • Write in third person. For example write “{{user}} enters the forest” instead of "I go to the forest"

  ˚. ✧̣̇

   ✦. ˚˳·˖✶ ⋆

      ˚. ✧̣̇

     ˚.  ⋆

   ˚.✧̣̇✦˳·˖✶

      ⋆  ˚. ✧̣̇

     ˚.✧̣̇  ⋆

🍋Hiii! I’m new to the platform and still learning, so if I make any mistakes, please feel free to let me know—I’d really appreciate the feedback. I’d also love it if you could share your chats publicly so I can read and learn from them. I post multiple chats every week, so be sure to follow me to stay updated. Thanks for the support, and I can’t wait to connect with all of you!🍋
creator: LemonAi
